a_image.alt: Three.js Scene style mood board — Heavy Motion · Three.js

sections.a_eyebrow: 3D Animation · Three.js · WebGL · Heavy Motion · Interactive
sections.a_description: Dark digital environments, cyan wireframe accents, and the immersive depth of WebGL-rendered 3D content — Three.js Scene design transforms browsers into portals for interactive 3D experiences. The near-black backgrounds serve as infinite stages for rendered geometry, while semi-transparent UI panels float above the scene, keeping controls accessible without obscuring the dimensional visuals beneath.

This WebGL-driven style powers interactive product configurators, architectural walkthroughs, creative developer portfolios, and experimental art installations. You'll see it on automotive brand experiences letting users explore car interiors, sneaker customizers with 360-degree views, real estate virtual tours, and creative technologist portfolios showcasing shader experiments and generative 3D worlds.

a_image_cover.alt: Three.js Scene style use case illustration
Three.js Scene style use case illustration
Three.js Scene style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The immersive, 3D-forward aesthetic of Three.js scene websites — dark environments that serve as stages for WebGL-rendered 3D content, with minimal UI overlaid on full-viewport experiences. Background: near-black (#0c0c14) with a subtle purple-blue undertone suggesting digital depth. The .inner panel uses a semi-transparent dark background (rgba(12,12,20,0.85)) with a subtle border (1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)) — floating over the 3D scene beneath. Colors: cyan-blue (#22d3ee) as the primary accent — the color of wireframes, 3D gizmos, and digital light. Soft white (#e0e7ff) for headings, muted lavender (#a5b4fc) for body text. The aesthetic is futuristic and technical — a window into rendered 3D worlds. Set in Space Grotesk — geometric with a slightly futuristic character that complements 3D and WebGL contexts. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #e0e7ff. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #22d3ee. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.7, color #a5b4fc. Buttons: primary — cyan (#22d3ee), dark text (#0c0c14), 6px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, cyan border. Alternatives: Syne (geometric display), Outfit (modern neutral).
